title: BEM-586 operator reply intake
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
decisions=Path('governance/operator_decisions'); decisions.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
handoffs=Path('governance/tasks/pending'); handoffs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

protocol=protocols/'OPERATOR_REPLY_INTAKE_POLLER.md'
protocol.write_text('# BEM-586 | Operator Reply Intake Poller'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:27 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Назначение'+sep+sep+'Фиксировать текстовые ответы оператора `1`, `2`, `3` или свой вариант из Telegram в repo.'+sep+sep+'## Поток'+sep+sep+'1. GitHub Actions вызывает Telegram Bot API `getUpdates`.'+sep+'2. Ответ сохраняется во временный JSON.'+sep+'3. Python parser выбирает последнее сообщение от `TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID`.'+sep+'4. Если текст похож на решение, создаётся `governance/operator_decisions/<decision_id>.json`.'+sep+'5. Создаётся handoff-файл для куратора в `governance/tasks/pending/`.'+sep+sep+'## Ограничение'+sep+sep+'Без webhook или schedule poller запускается через `workflow_dispatch`. Для автоматического режима можно добавить вызов poller в безопасный существующий `curator-hourly-report.yml`, потому что только этот workflow имеет разрешённый schedule.'+sep)

parser=scripts/'operator_reply_intake.py'
source=[
'#!/usr/bin/env python3',
'import json',
'from pathlib import Path',
'SEP = bytes.fromhex("0a").decode("ascii")',
'UPDATES_PATH = Path("governance/tmp/operator_reply_updates.json")',
'STATUS_PATH = Path("governance/tmp/operator_reply_status.txt")',
'STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json")',
'DISPATCH_STATE_PATH = Path("governance/state/operator_decision_dispatcher_state.json")',
'DECISIONS_DIR = Path("governance/operator_decisions")',
'HANDOFF_DIR = Path("governance/tasks/pending")',
'TRANSPORT_PATH = Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl")',
'REPORT_PATH = Path("governance/reports/operator_reply_intake_result.md")',
'def load_json(path, default):',
'    if path.exists():',
'        try:',
'            return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))',
'        except Exception:',
'            return default',
'    return default',
'def save_json(path, obj):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    path.write_text(json.dumps(obj, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'def append_jsonl(path, record):',
'    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:',
'        handle.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False) + SEP)',
'def active_decision_id():',
'    st = load_json(DISPATCH_STATE_PATH, {})',
'    last = st.get("last_run") if isinstance(st, dict) else None',
'    if isinstance(last, dict) and last.get("decision_id"):',
'        return str(last.get("decision_id"))',
'    return "unknown_decision"',
'def normalize_choice(text):',
'    raw = " ".join(str(text or "").strip().split())',
'    low = raw.lower()',
'    if low in ["1", "1.", "1)", "да", "так", "yes", "y", "подтверждаю", "approve", "approved"]:',
'        return "1", raw',
'    if low in ["2", "2.", "2)", "нет", "no", "n", "доработать", "на доработку", "reject", "rework"]:',
'        return "2", raw',
'    if low in ["3", "3.", "3)", "свой", "свой вариант", "custom"]:',
'        return "3", raw',
'    if raw:',
'        return "custom", raw',
'    return None, raw',
'def extract_updates(data):',
'    result = data.get("result") if isinstance(data, dict) else []',
'    return result if isinstance(result, list) else []',
'def main():',
'    status = STATUS_PATH.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore").strip() if STATUS_PATH.exists() else "missing_status"',
'    updates = load_json(UPDATES_PATH, {})',
'    state = load_json(STATE_PATH, {})',
'    seen = set(state.get("seen_update_ids", []))',
'    chosen = None',
'    max_update_id = state.get("last_update_id", 0)',
'    for upd in extract_updates(updates):',
'        uid = upd.get("update_id")',
'        if uid is not None:',
'            try:',
'                max_update_id = max(int(max_update_id), int(uid))',
'            except Exception:',
'                pass',
'        if str(uid) in seen:',
'            continue',
'        msg = upd.get("message") or upd.get("edited_message") or {}',
'        text = msg.get("text") or ""',
'        choice, raw = normalize_choice(text)',
'        if choice:',
'            chosen = {"update_id": uid, "message": msg, "choice": choice, "raw_text": raw}',
'    record = None',
'    blocker = None',
'    if chosen is None:',
'        status_out = "no_operator_reply_found"',
'    else:',
'        decision_id = active_decision_id()',
'        DECISIONS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'        HANDOFF_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'        rec = {',
'            "schema_version": "operator_decision.v1",',
'            "decision_id": decision_id,',
'            "source": "telegram_text_reply",',
'            "operator_choice": chosen.get("choice"),',
'            "raw_text": chosen.get("raw_text"),',
'            "telegram_update_id": chosen.get("update_id"),',
'            "status": "received",',
'            "handoff_to": "curator",',
'            "created_at": "workflow_runtime"',
'        }',
'        decision_path = DECISIONS_DIR / (decision_id + ".json")',
'        save_json(decision_path, rec)',
'        handoff = HANDOFF_DIR / ("operator_decision_" + decision_id + ".md")',
'        handoff.write_text("# Operator decision handoff" + SEP + SEP + "Decision: " + decision_id + SEP + "Choice: " + str(rec.get("operator_choice")) + SEP + "Raw: " + str(rec.get("raw_text")) + SEP + SEP + "Next: curator must route this decision into the internal contour." + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'        record = rec',
'        status_out = "operator_decision_recorded"',
'    for upd in extract_updates(updates):',
'        if upd.get("update_id") is not None:',
'            seen.add(str(upd.get("update_id")))',
'    state["seen_update_ids"] = sorted(seen)',
'    state["last_update_id"] = max_update_id',
'    state["last_run"] = {"http_status": status, "status": status_out, "record": record, "blocker": blocker}',
'    save_json(STATE_PATH, state)',
'    tr = {"record_type":"operator_reply_intake","cycle_id":"bem586-operator-reply-intake-poller","status":status_out,"http_status":status,"record":record,"blocker":blocker,"created_at":"workflow_runtime"}',
'    append_jsonl(TRANSPORT_PATH, tr)',
'    REPORT_PATH.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)',
'    REPORT_PATH.write_text("# BEM-586 | Operator Reply Intake Result" + SEP + SEP + json.dumps(tr, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + SEP, encoding="utf-8")',
'    print(json.dumps(tr, ensure_ascii=False))',
'if __name__ == "__main__":',
'    main()',
]
parser.write_text(sep.join(source)+sep)

workflow=wfs/'operator-reply-intake.yml'
workflow.write_text('''name: Operator Reply Intake

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: operator-reply-intake
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  intake-operator-reply:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Syntax check reply intake
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/operator_reply_intake.py

      - name: Fetch Telegram updates
        env:
          TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p governance/tmp
          if [ -z "$TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN" ]; then
            echo "not_sent_missing_secret" > governance/tmp/operator_reply_status.txt
            echo '{"ok":false,"result":[]}' > governance/tmp/operator_reply_updates.json
          else
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -sS -o governance/tmp/operator_reply_updates.json -w "%{http_code}" "https://api.telegram.org/bot${TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN}/getUpdates" || echo "000")
            echo "$HTTP_CODE" > governance/tmp/operator_reply_status.txt
          fi

      - name: Parse and record operator reply
        run: python3 scripts/operator_reply_intake.py

      - name: Commit intake result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/state/operator_reply_intake_state.json governance/operator_decisions governance/tasks/pending governance/transport/results.jsonl governance/reports/operator_reply_intake_result.md
          git commit -m "BEM-586 operator reply intake result" || echo "No changes"
          git pull --rebase origin main || git rebase --abort || true
          git push || (git pull --rebase origin main && git push)
''')

report=reports/'bem586_operator_reply_intake_poller.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-586 | Operator Reply Intake Poller | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 22:27 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Implemented workflow_dispatch poller for Telegram replies. It fetches updates, parses 1/2/3/custom text, writes operator_decisions JSON, and creates curator handoff.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem586_operator_reply_intake_poller','cycle_id':'bem586-operator-reply-intake-poller','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(parser),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 22:27 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem586_operator_reply_intake_poller']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(workflow),'script':str(parser),'mode':'workflow_dispatch_getUpdates','blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 22:27 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem586_operator_reply_intake_poller.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-586 PASS: operator reply intake poller implemented.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(protocol),str(parser),str(workflow),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Implemented operator reply intake poller: Telegram getUpdates -> operator_decisions JSON -> curator handoff')
"""
No issue comments.
